hero.alt: Activities and experiences available in Alentejo
hero.title: Activities and Experiences

title: Activities and Experiences
description: Discover the many experiences that Alentejo has to offer, from outdoor activities to discovering local gastronomy.

activities.title: Costa Vicentina Beaches
activities.description: A few kilometers away, discover some of the most beautiful beaches in Portugal, in the Southwest Alentejo and Costa Vicentina Natural Park.

activities.title: Trails and Walks
activities.description: Explore the natural beauty of Alentejo through various hiking trails that pass through stunning landscapes.

activities.title: Heritage and Culture
activities.description: Discover the rich history and Alentejo culture by visiting monuments, museums, and traditional towns.

activities.title: Alentejo Gastronomy
activities.description: Taste authentic Alentejo cuisine at local restaurants and discover traditional flavors.
highlights: Typical restaurants in Zambujeira do Mar

activities.title: Nature Observation
activities.description: Alentejo is a paradise for nature lovers, with unique fauna and flora.

activities.title: Sports and Adventure
activities.description: For the more adventurous, the region offers several sports activities.

items.name: Air conditioning

items.name: Breakfast
items.description: Breakfast with regional products every day

items.name: Garden
items.description: Spacious green areas for walking and resting

items.name: Bicycles
items.description: Bicycles available to explore the surroundings
